query:
SELECT a.id, a.demandId, a.workerId, w.name as workerName, a.scheduledStart, a.scheduledEnd, a.status 
FROM assignments a 
LEFT JOIN workers w ON a.workerId = w.id 
WHERE date(a.scheduledStart) = '2026-02-14' 
ORDER BY a.scheduledStart;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2iEKifVQ9gKtEas.9cbf5414b428 --database CMgr35KntT8tLtgpfJPejw --execute SELECT a.id, a.demandId, a.workerId, w.name as workerName, a.scheduledStart, a.scheduledEnd, a.status
